violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Absorbent towels noted used to cover food in front cooler.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mop not hung.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Large oven interior noted in need of routine cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Shelving inside walkin cooler noted not in good repair rusting. Door seal needed to walkin freezer. ( can not close )
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor inside walkin freezer needs routine clkeaning. Some floor areas in kitchen need cleaning. Some carpet areas in dining area need cleaning.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): Exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. (lid is up)
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. ( to be 100 ppm )

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Some food products noted being stored not covered inside walkin cooler. Frozen turkey noted on floor inside walkin freezer. A few food storage bins for powdered and granular noted not labeled.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor inside walkin freezer dry-storage room and near toilets inside restrooms need cleaning. Ceiling fans in restrooms need cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle not provided near toilets in women's restroom.
